summary: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2.2.0 closed-loop compounding: finish_task can run automatic trace-to-behavior-rule distillation, cleanup invalid/duplicate behavior rules, refresh retrieval indexes, and keep auto sync enabled from installer/Codex hook config. Added verify:compounding to prove later memory search/context packs retrieve the promoted rule and memory-on behavior beats memory-off baseline.
decisions: Version bumped to 2.2.0 for closed-loop compounding semantics.
finish_task runs runCompoundingCycle when DINOBRAIN_AUTO_COMPOUND=1, before auto_sync.
Installer and current Codex config/hook now set DINOBRAIN_AUTO_COMPOUND=1 along with auto growth and auto sync.
verify:os now fails if Codex/Claude hook or MCP env misses auto-compound wiring.
Knowledge compounding proof requires a promoted behavior rule to be retrieved by a later Context Pack and memory-on behavior lift to be positive.
next_steps: Restart or reload Codex so the currently running MCP tool surface exposes v2.2.0 tools including run_compounding_cycle.
Commit and push app repo changes, tag v2.2.0, build/package release asset, and commit/push data repo operational records.
search_queries: DinoBrain closed loop compounding behavior rule verification
